zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar於1399年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林時，她的父親Alexander Livingstone of Callendar17歲，母親Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas15歲。她於1422年10月20日與Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow在蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和12個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年1月1日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡焦福享年40歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛包爾鮑登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar于1399年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林时，她的父亲Alexander Livingstone of Callendar17岁，母亲Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas15岁。她于1422年10月20日与Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow在苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和12个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年1月1日在苏格兰藍納可爾卡焦福享年40岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛包爾鮑登。

nameMeanings.name: Livingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Dunleavy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Connor, John Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duinnshléibhe or Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘son of Donn Sléibhe’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + sléibhe ‘of the mountain’, meaning ‘chieftain (literally, brown one) of the mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar was born in 1399, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, was 17 and her mother, Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, was 15. She married Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow on 20 October 1422, in Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 12 daughters. She died on 1 January 1439, in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Bowden, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar est née en 1399, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow le 20 octobre 1422, à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 12 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1439, à Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Bowden, Roxburghshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar 1399 in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Livingstone of Callendar 17 und ihre Mutter Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas 15. Sie hat am 20. Oktober 1422 in Stirlingshire, Scotland Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1439 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Bowden, Roxburghshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar è nata il nel 1399 nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow il 20 ottobre 1422, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 12 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1439, nel Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Bowden, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Livingston of Callendarが1399年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで生まれた時，父Alexander Livingstone of Callendarは17歳，母Lady Janet Dauphine Dundasは15歳であった。1422年10月20日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでSir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年1月1日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカドゾウで40歳で死去し，スコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアボウデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar(이)가 1399년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Livingstone of Callendar(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1422년 10월 20일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카드즈에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 보우든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar nasceu em 1399, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow em 20 de outubro de 1422, em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 12 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1439, em Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Bowden, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar родилась в 1399 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Livingstone of Callendar было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow 20 октября 1422 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 12 дочерей. Она умерла 1 января 1439 г. в местности кадзоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности боуден, роксбургшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Janet Livingston of Callendar nació en 1399, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir James Hamilton 5th of Cadzow el 20 de octubre de 1422, en Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1439, en Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Bowden, Roxburghshire, Scotland.
